HOW TO PLAY

Spell words from your 10 tiles. 11 turns.

Tap letters, then SUBMIT. Tiles refill after each word.

SHUFFLE re-orders your rack for free.

? = one bonus letter, once per game.

Rack always has 2–4 vowels.
